title: urophyllum chlamydanthum
intro: Urophyllum chlamydanthum, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a type of evergreen shrub native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and stems of Urophyllum chlamydanthum are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Urophyllum chlamydanthum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for consumption, and it is also used in the production of herbal teas and tonics.
